=== Game Research: Street Fighter 2: 2D fighting game ===

[Design Best Practices]
• Play the best 2D action games free online. No download needed - instant classic gameplay! Explore our collection of 2D action games . Free browser-based gaming - play now!
• The Osaka based company seemed to produce one hit after another with Ghouls&#x27;n Ghosts in 1988, Final Fight in 1989 and Street Fighter II in 1991 among a myriad of other excellent games . During this era, a video- game enthusiast could not go to an arcade without seeing multiple Capcom cabinets, 
• Akira &#x27;Nin-Nin&#x27; Nishitani is a legend in the Fighting Game Community, having served as the planner of Street Fighter 2 , and occupying key roles during the development of the Street Fighter EX ...
• At one point, Harada asks how Nishitani and the Capcom team managed to set a new bar for game design with Street Fighter II. For the veteran game designer, it wasn&#x27;t about honing in on a specific mechanic, but rather about fixing some glaring mistakes and dialing up the fun factor.
